ignoreMode.title: Ignore everyone and everything
ignoreMode.description: This option will make Treat Wheel temporarily disabled. It can be reenabled without rebooting, but enabling it render all hiding options useless till disabled.

propSpoofing.title: Disable prop spoofing (futile)
propSpoofing.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop spoofing sensitive and custom ROM related props. A reboot is required for this toggle to take effect.

gsiTraceHiding.title: Disable GSI traces hiding (futile)
gsiTraceHiding.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop hiding GSI traces.

zygoteMountInfoLeakFixing.title: Disable Zygote mountinfo leak fixing
zygoteMountInfoLeakFixing.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop fixing, as in making it as expected in unrooted systems, the mountinfo leak that Zygote creates. Requires Android 11 or higher.

mapsHiding.title: Disable maps hiding (futile)
mapsHiding.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop hiding suspicious mapping. This type of hiding is futile, but it helps pass some detections.

ReVancedModuleMountsHiding.title: Disable ReVanced modules mounts hiding
ReVancedModuleMountsHiding.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop hiding the mounts that ReVanced modules creates globally. ReVanced modules must explicitly have support to Treat Wheel for it to umount them.

customFontLoading.title: Disable custom font loading
customFontLoading.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop loading custom fonts from the system.

denylistLogicInversion.title: Disable denylist logic inversion
denylistLogicInversion.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop inverting DenyList, so that applications in the DenyList will have root hidden, and the ones in will not have it hidden. Similarly to Magisk Kitsune's SuList when this toggle is disabled.

moduleLoadingTracesHiding.title: Disable module loading traces hiding
moduleLoadingTracesHiding.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop hiding traces generated by some modules during their loading.

fridaTracesHiding.title: Disable Frida traces hiding
fridaTracesHiding.description: This option will make Treat Wheel stop hiding injection traces generated by Frida.

language.title: Change language
language.description: Change the language of the WebUI to the selected one.

fullscreen.title: Disable fullscreen mode in WebUI
fullscreen.description: This option will make the WebUI not fill the whole screen.
